# seerr_permission_set (Data Source)

Compose a set of Seerr permissions into a single bitmask integer.

Common permission sets:
- **User**: `request`, `request_movie`, `request_tv` (Value: 786464)
- **Power User**: `request`, `request_movie`, `request_tv`, `request_4k`, `auto_approve` (Value: 787616)
- **Admin**: `admin` (Value: 2)

## Example Usage

```terraform
﻿data "seerr_permission_set" "power_user" {
  request       = true
  request_movie = true
  request_tv    = true
  request_4k    = true
  auto_approve  = true
}

resource "seerr_user_permissions" "example" {
  user_id     = 123
  permissions = data.seerr_permission_set.power_user.permissions
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `admin` (Boolean) Permission: admin
- `auto_approve` (Boolean) Permission: auto_approve
- `auto_approve_4k` (Boolean) Permission: auto_approve_4k
- `auto_approve_4k_movie` (Boolean) Permission: auto_approve_4k_movie
- `auto_approve_4k_tv` (Boolean) Permission: auto_approve_4k_tv
- `auto_approve_movie` (Boolean) Permission: auto_approve_movie
- `auto_approve_tv` (Boolean) Permission: auto_approve_tv
- `auto_request` (Boolean) Permission: auto_request
- `auto_request_movie` (Boolean) Permission: auto_request_movie
- `auto_request_tv` (Boolean) Permission: auto_request_tv
- `create_issues` (Boolean) Permission: create_issues
- `manage_blocklist` (Boolean) Permission: manage_blocklist
- `manage_issues` (Boolean) Permission: manage_issues
- `manage_requests` (Boolean) Permission: manage_requests
- `manage_settings` (Boolean) Permission: manage_settings
- `manage_users` (Boolean) Permission: manage_users
- `recent_view` (Boolean) Permission: recent_view
- `request` (Boolean) Permission: request
- `request_4k` (Boolean) Permission: request_4k
- `request_4k_movie` (Boolean) Permission: request_4k_movie
- `request_4k_tv` (Boolean) Permission: request_4k_tv
- `request_advanced` (Boolean) Permission: request_advanced
- `request_movie` (Boolean) Permission: request_movie
- `request_tv` (Boolean) Permission: request_tv
- `request_view` (Boolean) Permission: request_view
- `view_blocklist` (Boolean) Permission: view_blocklist
- `view_issues` (Boolean) Permission: view_issues
- `vote` (Boolean) Permission: vote
- `watchlist_view` (Boolean) Permission: watchlist_view

### Read-Only

- `permissions` (Number) The combined permission bitmask integer. Use this value with `seerr_user_permissions`.
